what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML front matter only, with no body content.
standouts: References a board item using a board:// URI scheme.
Attachment type board_items signals a cross-system link between channel memory and a board entity.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
File is named att-<uuid>.md inside the channel_attachments directory.
Target uses a board://<item-id> URI format.
notes: A lightweight metadata stub that attaches a board item reference to a channel memory entry.
questions: What specific content or relationship does this attachment represent beyond the URI?
Is the target board item expected to exist in a separate board store?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a board_items attachment matches the recorded target URI and channel; the file is purely metadata and contains no additional payload.
intention_signals: To create a durable, file-based reference from a channel memory attachment to a specific board item for later retrieval or fusion.
contribution: Provides a persistent, discoverable link between a channel attachment and a board item, enabling graph traversal from channel memory into board entities.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file of type board_items that links the dragnet-development channel to board item item-e2dd1772 via a board:// URI and records its creation timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a reference from a channel memory attachment to a board item for cross-system lookup and fusion.
